steps.title: Distribute the fraction
steps.content:
Rewrite the equation so the $x$ terms are easy to combine.
$$
y=\frac{1}{4}(25x+17)+8x
$$
$$
y=\frac{25x}{4}+\frac{17}{4}+8x
$$

steps.title: Combine the coefficients
steps.content: Write $8x$ with denominator $4$, then add the coefficients of $x$. $$ 8x=\frac{32x}{4} $$ $$ \frac{25x}{4}+\frac{32x}{4}=\frac{57x}{4}=14.25x $$ The answer is 14.25.
